'''Wizards.com''' is the official website of [[Wizards of the Coast]], a subsidiary of [[Hasbro Inc.]]. Beginning with the introduction of Wizards' ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' in [[2000]], the website included various supplements and information for the roleplaying game, ''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]'', and the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]''. On [[May 28]], [[2010]], with the conclusion of Wizards' license with [[Lucasfilm]], all ''Star Wars'' material was removed from the website.
